biodiversity_commitments.text: Implement regenerative agriculture practices on 1 million hectares of agricultural land by 2030.
Help protect and restore 1 million hectares of natural ecosystems by 2030.
Maintain no deforestation across our primary deforestation-linked commodities 95%.

We have plans to increase the implementation of our regenerative agriculture initiatives to more than 400,000 hectares through supplier programmes and co-investment through our Regenerative Agriculture Fund in 2026.

climate_targets.text: Reduce absolute operational GHG emissions (Scope 1 & 2) by 100% by 2030 from a 2015 baseline.
Reduce absolute Scope 3 energy and industrial (E&I) GHG emissions by 42% by 2030 from a 2021 baseline.
Reduce absolute Scope 3 forest, land and agriculture (FLAG) GHG emissions by 30.3% by 2030 from a 2021 baseline.
Our long-term ambition to achieve net zero GHG emissions by 2039.

water_disclosures.text: Implement water stewardship programmes in 100 locations in water-stressed areas by 2030.
Water shortages in areas of high water stress - Negative Impact - Own Operations; Value Chain.

supply_chain_claims.text: Suppliers representing 50% of our procurement spend to sign the Living Wage Promise by 2026.
Help 250,000 smallholder farmers in our supply chain access livelihoods programmes by 2026.
Help 2.5 million SMEs in our retail value chain grow their business by 2026.
In 2025, we sourced 81% of our key crops sustainably.
Our goal is to source 95% of our key crops sustainably by 2030.
In 2025, we exceeded 95% purchase volumes of palm oil, paper and board, tea, soy and cocoa as deforestation-free, based on Unilever’s requirements.

top_sustainability_claims.text: Protecting and enhancing the value of our business through innovation, operational efficiency and long-term resilience.
Reduce absolute operational GHG emissions (Scope 1 & 2) by 100% by 2030 from a 2015 baseline.
We increased our use of post-consumer recycled (PCR) plastic this year, achieving our goal of 25% PCR by 2025.
Help protect and restore 1 million hectares of natural ecosystems by 2030.
Suppliers representing 50% of our procurement spend to sign the Living Wage Promise by 2026.

document_summary: Unilever's 2025 Annual Report highlights accelerated business transformation and progress towards sustainability goals across climate, nature, plastics, and livelihoods. Key achievements include SBTi-validated GHG reduction targets, increased use of recycled plastic, and commitments to deforestation-free sourcing and water stewardship. The report emphasizes driving value creation through a sharper portfolio, elevated brands, and improved execution, all underpinned by its comprehensive sustainability agenda.
extraction_notes: The document explicitly states alignment with TNFD scenarios on page 227, but not explicit adoption of the TNFD framework for reporting, hence 'tnfd_adopter' is false. All other requested information was clearly found with specific figures and years.
